title: Ancient Shrine
description: Hidden deep within the woods stands a weathered shrine, untouched by time. Fresh flowers rest upon the altar despite no one being in sight. A faint warmth lingers in the air, as though something is quietly watching.

options.title: Leave an Offering
options.description: Place a few coins upon the altar and quietly offer your respect.

options.title: Search the Shrine
options.description: There may be forgotten relics hidden beneath the old stones.

options.title: Loot the Shrine
options.description: Sacred or not, valuables left unattended belong to whoever finds them.
